info.title: Backend Reference API
info.description: Minimal example OpenAPI contract for the template backend stub (MSRV/CONTRACT-002). This is the SOURCE OF TRUTH the frontend generates its API client from via `contract:gen`. Real projects emit this from their framework (e.g. an OpenAPI export). The frontend resolves this path config-driven through coord/project.config.js (repos.F.contract), not a hardcoded sibling path.

post.summary: Authenticate and receive a session token
